p5.tag: 假設語氣倒裝（第三條件句）
p5.pre: Had the board approved the merger proposal, the company
p5.post: significantly expanded its market share within the following fiscal year.
p5.zh: 若董事會已批准合併提案，公司將在接下來的財政年度內大幅擴展其市場份額。
p5.why: 此句為倒裝假設語氣（省略 if，Had 提前），屬第三條件句（與過去事實相反）。主要子句應使用 would / could / might + have + 過去分詞，故選 would have（後接 expanded）。will have 為未來完成式，語意不符；would 後需接動詞原形，而非過去分詞；had 不符合主要子句結構。

p5.post: for its stringent quality control measures, the pharmaceutical firm has maintained an unblemished regulatory record for over two decades.
p5.zh: 以嚴格的品質管控措施聞名，這家製藥公司二十多年來保持著無瑕的法規遵循記錄。
p5.why: 被動分詞構句中，當主詞（the pharmaceutical firm）是動作的承受者時，可直接以過去分詞開頭，為 Being renowned 的省略形式。Having renowned 錯誤（renowned 非及物動詞的過去分詞用法）；To be renowned 為不定詞，表目的而非附帶說明；Renowning 不存在此動詞形式。

p5.post: the legal team spent three months negotiating, were ultimately rejected by the arbitration panel.
p5.zh: 修訂後的合約條款（法律團隊花了三個月進行談判）最終被仲裁小組否決。
p5.why: 非限定關係子句（逗號隔開，補充說明資訊）絕對不可用 that，必須用 which。which 代替先行詞 the revised contractual terms，作 negotiating 的受詞（spent three months negotiating which → which the legal team spent three months negotiating）。over which 和 in which 與此動詞搭配語意不符。

p5.post: the subsidiary's mounting debt obligations, proceeded as scheduled following approval from the regulatory commission.
p5.zh: 儘管子公司債務負擔日益加重，此次收購仍按計畫在監管委員會批准後如期進行。
p5.why: notwithstanding 是高階正式讓步介系詞，直接接名詞片語，無需搭配其他介系詞，意為「儘管」。despite of 錯誤（despite 直接接名詞，無需 of）；in spite 必須與 of 連用才完整；regardless 需接 of。notwithstanding 亦可後置使用（the debt notwithstanding），為法律文件的常見正式用法。

p5.pre: The board of directors recommends that the chief financial officer
p5.post: a comprehensive audit of all overseas subsidiaries before the close of the fiscal quarter.
p5.zh: 董事會建議財務長在本財季結束前對所有海外子公司進行全面審計。
p5.why: recommend that 後接的名詞子句須用假設語氣（subjunctive mood），動詞維持原形，第三人稱單數不加 -s，故選 conduct。此結構適用於 recommend／suggest／insist／demand／require + that 的從句。conducts 錯誤（多餘 -s）；conducted 為過去式；has conducted 為現在完成式，均不符假設語氣要求。

p6.title: Memorandum: Organizational Restructuring and Compliance Obligations
seg: We write to inform all department heads of the forthcoming changes to the company's organizational structure, which

by the Board of Directors at last month's extraordinary general meeting. These changes are intended to streamline operations across our global network and enhance accountability at every level of management.

, the restructuring will necessitate a comprehensive review of all existing inter-departmental reporting lines. Each department head is required to submit a detailed workflow assessment to the Human Resources Division no later than June 30, 2026. Failure to comply with this deadline may result in administrative penalties under Section 12 of the Employee Conduct Policy.

to oversee the reallocation of budgetary resources in alignment with the new organizational framework. All procurement requests exceeding USD 50,000 will henceforth require dual authorization from both the respective department head and the Chief Financial Officer.
We appreciate your cooperation and anticipate that the transition will be completed without significant disruption to ongoing operations.

blanks.zh: 被董事會在上個月的臨時股東大會上批准
blanks.why: 時間副詞 at last month's 指定明確過去時間點，須用簡單過去式；先行詞 changes 為複數且動作由 Board 執行，故用過去被動 were ratified。現在完成進行式 have been ratifying 表主動持續，語意不符；will be ratified 為未來式，與 last month 形成矛盾。

blanks.zh: 為此，這次重組將需要全面審查所有現有的跨部門彙報關係。
blanks.why: To this end 意為「為此目的」，承接上段說明改革目標後引出具體執行措施，邏輯最為順暢。Nevertheless 表讓步轉折；By contrast 表對比；In retrospect 表回顧過去，三者均與上下文「目的導向」的語篇邏輯矛盾。

blanks.tag: 詞彙語意（正式授權動詞）
blanks.zh: 財務部已被正式授命監督預算資源的重新分配
blanks.why: mandated 意為「被正式授命、授權」，帶有強制性官方指令的意涵，適用於公司內部正式授權場景。requested 和 suggested 語氣過輕，缺乏強制性；invited 用於非正式邀請，不符合法律備忘錄的語域要求。

opts: Should you require further clarification regarding the revised reporting structure, please do not hesitate to contact the Office of the Chief Operating Officer directly.
The aforementioned changes will take effect upon the ratification of the amended corporate charter.
All staff members are encouraged to submit their vacation requests well in advance of any scheduled leave.
The company's annual performance review cycle commences in the fourth quarter of each fiscal year.
blanks.zh: 若您需要進一步了解修訂後的彙報架構，請隨時直接聯繫營運長辦公室。
blanks.why: 結尾段承接「感謝合作」，需要提供聯絡資訊或後續行動指引以完整段落。選項A以倒裝條件句 Should you require（正式語氣）提供具體聯絡管道，符合備忘錄慣例結尾格式；B重複前文已涵蓋的生效資訊；C、D與本備忘錄主題無關，插入後打斷邏輯一致性。
